camera.notes: Strict overhead read for gameplay. Do not drift into side view unless a grounded move requires a controlled tilt reference.

style_target: Realistic adult wrestler proportions in clean top down vector line art, rig friendly, readable at Phaser game scale.

test_wrestlers.gear: dark trunks, dark boots, dark wrist tape

test_wrestlers.hair: short light blond or light brown hair
test_wrestlers.gear: tan or gold trunks, matching boots, light wrist tape

body_parts.visible_read: hair crown and top plane of head
broad shoulders, chest mass, trunks and hips as one core

required_first_poses.notes: One boot forward, subtle knee and lower leg reveal.
More dynamic stride, arms pump but stay readable from above.
Lower center of gravity, arms down and forward, shoulders wide.
Arms raised and open, hands readable for lock up.
Lying on back, face and chest plane slightly more visible.
Gimmick pose for yoga or taunt style behavior.
